details.test: Task 1: Place hold on earliest available Pride and Prejudice paperback under 400 pages
Task 2: Create reading list from filtered catalog search results
Task 3: Renew two soonest-due loans within 3 days that have no holds
Task 4: Pay smallest unpaid overdue fine using stored Visa card ending in 1234
Task 5: Reserve earliest available 2-hour study room slot on upcoming Saturday at Central Branch
Task 6: Create "Storytime" reading list via browse categories
Task 7: Submit purchase suggestion for Clean Architecture print book with Central Library pickup
Task 8: Staff moves catalog item to Reference section and adds subject tags
Task 9: Create citation list from Main Branch results and open citation view
